ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Nominal value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the timing parameter */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the parameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the parameter is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Link to the component's specification document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the component */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the component is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_timing" (
  "component_timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-timing association */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component referenced */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter referenced */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the association is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_timing_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_timing_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_timing_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_timing_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
